ideation: This animation sequence will portray a robot expressing neutrality or perhaps a sense of blankness.  The animation will involve a slow, deliberate movement, starting with arms at the sides, then slowly raising them to shoulder height, and finally returning to a neutral position.  This will visually align with the simplicity and lack of strong emotion associated with a blank square. The robot's actions will communicate a feeling of emptiness or neutrality.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, a blank slate
arms slowly rise to a neutral, empty plane
arms return to rest, the void remains
